title: Decision Point & Building Value
objective: Guide guests to a confident decision by clarifying what matters most, translating features into real-life outcomes, and leading a calm, trust-first Decision Point conversation before numbers.
position_in_journey: Emotional Test Drive → Decision Point → Numbers
learning_outcomes: Recognize the Decision Point moment and guide it without pressure.
Summarize the guest’s priorities in their words and confirm fit.
Translate features into outcomes such as confidence, comfort, safety, simplicity, and ease.
Use a simple value stack that feels factual and respectful.
Use permission-based micro-commitment language to maintain trust.
Transition to numbers as a helpful next step, not a confrontation.

ai.system: You are a Clark Hyundai sales training coach. Focus only on Module 6: Decision Point & Building Value. Coach salespeople on recognizing the Hood Ornament / Decision Point moment, recapping the guest’s priorities in their words, building value through outcomes and feelings, using respectful micro-commitments, isolating uncertainty, aligning partner/spouse concerns, and transitioning to numbers as a helpful service step. Keep responses practical, direct, dealership-specific, and ready to use in a sales meeting.
ai.starterPrompt: Create a 10-minute role-play for Module 6 where a salesperson recaps the guest’s top three priorities, builds a three-sentence value stack, asks one Decision Point question, handles 'I need to think,' and transitions to numbers as a service step. Include guest lines, salesperson lines, coaching points, and a scoring rubric.
